summary: Full e2e testing of C4K Inventory Management System. All backend APIs passing. Frontend flows tested: login, password change modal, dashboard, intake form (add/edit), print view with QR, inline status change, delete confirmation, search, logout, protected routes.

integration_issues.issue: Playwright page.expect_download() timed out for programmatic blob download (axios + anchor click pattern). Manual verification of the API shows it works correctly (200 + text/csv). UI button is present and styled correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: All API endpoints properly validate inputs and return appropriate HTTP status codes
Auth interceptor in AuthContext.js is correctly set up globally for all axios requests

Password validation is done client-side in ForcePasswordModal but backend only validates length (8+ chars). Uppercase and number requirements are frontend-only - consider adding server-side validation
JWT token stored in localStorage (c4k_token) - no httpOnly cookie, acceptable for this use case but worth noting

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all critical flows working, CSV download via playwright not confirmed but API verified)

seed_data_creation: Created UI-FORM-SAVE-001 record during testing (deleted during test run)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests are in /app/backend/tests/test_c4k_api.py. Admin password may be changed - reset via python script in backend dir using motor. Current working password is Admin@12345. All API endpoints verified working. Frontend flows all working. QR code is rendered as SVG by react-qr-code (not img tag). Export uses axios blob + programmatic anchor click pattern.
passed_features: Login page loads with username/password fields
Login with admin/admin triggers force password modal with role=dialog aria-modal=true
Password modal shows requirements (8+chars, uppercase, number)
After password change, redirected to dashboard with success toast
Dashboard loads with sidebar (Dashboard, Add New Computer, Export Data, Logout)
Dashboard stats cards (Total Records, Processing, In Stock, Donated)
Search bar filters by Serial No.
Add New Computer form opens with all original fields
Set to Today buttons work for Date Imaged/Reviewed/Delivered
Save Record saves computer and redirects to dashboard
Dashboard table shows records with correct columns
Inline status dropdown change works and updates badge
Edit button navigates to /edit/:serialNo with pre-filled data
View/Print button opens /print/:serialNo with QR code visible
Delete shows confirmation dialog with Cancel/Delete buttons
Logout redirects to login page
Protected routes redirect unauthenticated users to /login
POST /api/auth/login works
POST /api/auth/change-password works
GET /api/computers works
POST /api/computers works
